sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَ الْمَلْعَبُ عَنْ دَوْرَةٍ رِيَاضِيَّةٍ صَيْفِيَّةٍ لِلأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Sportski centar je objavio ljetnu sportsku školu za djecu.
sentences.translationEn: The sports center announced a summer sports camp for children.

sentences.arabic: تَشْمَلُ الدَّوْرَةُ كُرَةَ الْقَدَمِ وَالسِّبَاحَةَ وَالْجِمْبَازَ.
sentences.translation: Škola uključuje fudbal, plivanje i gimnastiku.
sentences.translationEn: The camp includes football, swimming, and gymnastics.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلأَطْفَالِ التَّسْجِيلُ ابْتِدَاءً مِنَ الأُسْبُوعِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca se mogu prijaviti počevši od sljedeće sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: Children can register starting from next week.

sentences.translation: Mjesta su ograničena, pa pohitaj s prijavom.
sentences.translationEn: Spots are limited so register quickly.
